texto: It must be borne in mind that the tragedy of life doesn’t lie in not reaching your goal. The tragedy lies in having no goal to reach. It isn’t a calamity to die with dreams unfulfilled, but it is a calamity not to dream. It is not a disaster to be unable to capture your ideal, but it is a disaster to have no ideal to capture. It is not a disgrace not to reach the stars, but it is a disgrace to have no stars to reach for. Not failure, but low aim is sin.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Benjamin Elijah Mays sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “It must be borne in mind that the tragedy of life doesn’t lie in not reaching your goal. The trag…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, goals, reach, útil em momentos de reflexao.
